rulings.Case Title: LUZ AL-DIJAILI ET AL VS. SHREE JALARAMBAPA HOTEL, L.P. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Deposition Of Kenneth Price And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 6, 2018, Line 2. DEFENDANTS BALWANTSINH THAKOR, LATABEN THAKOR, SHREE JALARAMBAPA HOTEL, LLP, BOB BHATWALA D.B.A. KEAN HOTEL'S Motion To Compel Deposition Of Kenneth Price And For Sanctions. GRANTED. rulings.Case Title: EDELIZA ANUNCIACION VS. LORNA ABAAN ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 6, 2018, Line 3. DEFENDANTS LORNA ABAAN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. GRANTED, subject to opposition. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YENN YEN LAI VS. ALLAN CHI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 6, 2018, Line 4. DEFENDANT DENNIS FLANDERS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to amend paragraph 17(f) to seek damages starting no earlier than August 15, 2018. Plaintiff shall have 5 days from notice of entry of order to amend. Defendant to prepare and present an order in conformity with this ruling at the hearing. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: K5 FAMILY LLC VS. MAIRE DAWN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 6, 2018, Line 5. DEFENDANT CHRIS ROLIZ-MAGUIGAD'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Demurrer is not a proper motion to assert Defendant's tenancy or tenancy rights. =(501/REQ)
